title: Playground Demo Board
concept: A compact enterprise task-board redesign for documentation writers, where Create, Save, Manage, Inspect, Export, and Debug lanes form a demo runbook and each workflow opens in a detail drawer while the live WordPress preview remains a board card.
focus: compact SaaS styling with thin borders
flows: Create Playgrounds from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save temporary Playgrounds to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Manage unsaved and browser-backed Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, and saved-list actions.
Inspect the current Playground through Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, and path navigation.
Export and package demos through GitHub export, download as zip, Blueprint bundle download, Blueprint link copy, and database.sqlite download.
Debug before documentation capture with reset/reload messaging, log streams, and route checks.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
